expected_behavior: RLS tenant access alone is insufficient; service/OPA policy enforces namespace, owner, membership, classification, and explicit promotion rules.
given: Two namespaces/workspaces exist inside the same tenant, such as Personal and Organization.
notes: Scenario-specific validator executed against local synthetic users, tenants, policy, Postgres RLS, OPA, egress, audit, and regression evidence as applicable.
required_evidence: Allow/deny decisions, zero implicit context use, provenance on allowed promotion.
then: RLS tenant access alone is insufficient; service/OPA policy enforces namespace, owner, membership, classification, and explicit promotion rules.
verification_method: Integration matrix for same-tenant personal/org/team/project access.
when: A principal accesses, searches, or uses context across them.
